    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    C

    car - package car
     
    Car - Class in car
    Car.java Code Description: Represents a car object in the game.
    Car(double, double, String) - Constructor for class car.Car
    Constructs a Car object at the specified position.
    CarController - Class in car
    CarController.java Code Description: Controls the main game loop and user input for the car simulation.
    CarController(String, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class car.CarController
    Constructs the game window and initializes the car and game loop.
    changeGroupColor(int, int) - Method in class track.CheckPointGroups
    Changes the color of all Tiles in the same checkpoint group as xPos yPos by setting hitCheckpoint to true
    changeTile(int, int, char) - Method in class track.Track
    This function is only used by TrackDrawerGUI to edit track tiles to allow us to customize tracks and make them more enjoyable for the user.
    checkpoint - Variable in enum class track.Tile.Surface
     
    CHECKPOINT - Enum constant in enum class track.Tile.Surface
     
    CheckPointGroups - Class in track
    CheckPointGroups.java Code Description: Groups connected checkpoint tiles by scanning for zones and mapping every tile in each zone to a checkpoint group number.
    CheckPointGroups(int, int, int, Track) - Constructor for class track.CheckPointGroups
    Constructor
    createGroups() - Method in class track.CheckPointGroups
    Scans the track, the first checkpoint tile of each group is used to create a zone, and every checkpoint tile in that zone gets assigned the current group number.
